nodes.label: Pre-session Home — App Blocking ON + Ritual Complement Checked + CTA
nodes.description: Home screen in pre-session state with app blocking fully configured. 'Mejora tu concentración' section: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube toggles are ON (teal); X and Facebook are OFF. 'Complementos del ritual' grid shows Meditar with a teal checkmark (completed/selected), plus Leer, Estudiar, Respirar, Gratitud, Entrenar, Journaling, Visualizar, Caminar, Suplementos (Nuevo badge). Sticky bottom CTA button: 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min'.

nodes.label: Begin Session CTA Button — 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min'
nodes.description: Full-width sticky bottom CTA button '○ Comenzar jornada · 15 min'. Shows selected duration inline in button label. Teal/dark styling. Appears when duration and configuration are ready.

nodes.label: Ritual Complement Card — Checkmark Selected State (Meditar)
nodes.description: Meditar card in ritual complements grid shows a teal circular checkmark in the top-right corner, indicating it is selected/active for the upcoming session. Demonstrates selected vs unselected card states.

nodes.label: Suplementos Ritual Card — 'Nuevo' Badge
nodes.description: Suplementos ritual complement card has a 'Nuevo' pill badge, indicating it is a newly added complement type. Pattern for surfacing new features within existing grids.

edges.description: Selected duration (15 min) is reflected inline in the 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min' CTA button label
Pre-session screen contains the begin-session CTA as its primary action
Pre-session home state transitions to active-session screen when CTA is tapped
Ritual complements grid in both screens; split-sections shows the selected (checkmarked) state for Meditar
Both are variant card states within the ritual complements grid (selected state vs new-badge state)
